name: Etron Technology, Inc.
summary: Etron Technology, Inc. develops buffer memory and system-on-chips in the United States, Europe, Japan, and Asian countries. The company offers known-good-die-memory integrated circuits (ICs), specialty dynamic random access memories (DRAMs), automotive DRAMs, consumer electronic DRAMs, and industrial DRAMs; and system ICs, including USB 3.0 host and flash drive controllers, Webcam controllers, and depth map controllers. It also provides eDRAM-by-dies, DRAM design-and-dies, and DRAM design-and-die foundry services, as well as boot device solutions. The company offers its products for use in AIOT, display panel, VR/AR, robot, automobile, communication, and computer applications. Etron Technology, Inc. was founded in 1991 and is headquartered in Hsinchu, Taiwan.
